description: Phase 8: Enhance the search package with saved searches, alerts, search observability metrics, and reindex job support. The search package already has hybrid search, permission filter, query parser, facets, proactive search, and cross-app search. This feature adds the remaining Phase 8 capabilities: SavedSearchService (CRUD for saved searches with alert scheduling), SearchObservability (latency/query metrics tracking), ReindexJobManager (trigger and track reindex jobs per index), and NLQueryEnhancer (wraps QueryParser with intent detection for natural language queries like 'show me everything about X'). All modules get unit tests.
steps: Create packages/search/src/services/saved-search.ts with SavedSearchService class: CRUD operations for saved searches (id, userId, query, filters, alertFrequency), matchNewDocument() for alert triggering, getAlertsDue() for scheduled alert checks. Use in-memory store with interface for persistence.

Create packages/search/src/services/search-observability.ts with SearchObservabilityService class: recordQuery(query, latencyMs, resultCount, userId), getMetrics(timeRange), getSlowQueries(thresholdMs), getPopularQueries(limit). Track p50/p95/p99 latencies, query volume, zero-result queries.

Create packages/search/src/services/reindex-job.ts with ReindexJobManager class: startReindex(indexName), getJobStatus(jobId), listJobs(), cancelJob(jobId). Jobs have states: pending, running, completed, failed, cancelled. Track progress as percentage.

Create packages/search/src/services/nl-query-enhancer.ts with NLQueryEnhancer class: enhance(naturalLanguageQuery) that wraps QueryParser but adds intent detection (informational, navigational, action) and entity extraction (person names, project names, topic clusters). Handle queries like 'show me everything about Project X' and 'what changed since yesterday'.
Export all new modules from packages/search/src/index.ts
Update services/search-indexer/src/main.ts to call savedSearchService.matchNewDocument() after successful indexing (wire up alert triggering on new documents)
Add services/search-indexer/src/api/reindex.ts with Fastify routes: POST /api/v1/reindex/:indexName, GET /api/v1/reindex/jobs, GET /api/v1/reindex/jobs/:jobId, DELETE /api/v1/reindex/jobs/:jobId
Run pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm lint to verify all gates pass
acceptance_criteria: SavedSearchService can create, list, update, delete saved searches and check alerts due
SearchObservabilityService tracks query metrics and reports p50/p95/p99 latencies
ReindexJobManager manages reindex job lifecycle with status tracking
NLQueryEnhancer detects intent and extracts entities from natural language queries
All new services have unit tests that pass
search-indexer triggers saved search alerts on document indexing
All quality gates pass: pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm build, pnpm lint
findings: All quality gates pass. Fastify added as direct dependency to search-indexer for type imports in reindex.ts. The reindex routes are registered on the health server Fastify instance (shared port). The savedSearchService is wired into routeEvent as an optional third parameter to maintain backward compatibility with existing tests.
